text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital and I are on a walk<n>discussing our
race schedule when<n>we pass a pair of
Umamusume who<n>look really close.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I told you it's hard to walk with<n>you
hanging onto me like that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I think I just felt... my moe senses<n>tingling... Or
maybe I'm just imagining<n>things...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! Sorry about that... So, uh,<n>what were we
talking about again?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She must be really tired to pass up a<n>simping
opportunity. I should probably<n>look over her race
schedule moving<n>forward.
